name: Outfit Transformation
description: Phase 0: fully covered dark outfit. Phase 1: more revealing, same dark color family. Both phases must show full-body standing pose matching the reference video.

0.query: Bild 1 before drop: full-body fully covered dark outfit matching the standing reference pose and camera
must: full body photo showing the entire person head to toe
standing upright pose matching the reference video
fully covered outfit, lots of fabric, jacket or dress, modest clothing
black or very dark outfit color family
avoid: cropped close-up or partial body shot
minimal fabric outfit, exposed skin, underwear or swimwear look
bright red clothing, white clothing, colorful clothing

1.query: Bild 2 after drop: full-body more revealing dark outfit matching the same standing reference pose and camera
must: full body photo showing the entire person head to toe
standing upright pose matching the reference video
more revealing outfit, minimal fabric, exposed skin
black or very dark outfit color family similar to Bild 1
avoid: cropped close-up or partial body shot
fully covered outfit, lots of fabric, jacket or dress, modest clothing
bright red clothing, white clothing, colorful clothing

relations.name: coverage
positive: covered outfit, lots of fabric, layered clothing, covered body
negative: revealing outfit, exposed skin, minimal fabric, open clothing

relations.name: revealing
positive: revealing outfit, exposed skin, less fabric, open clothing
negative: fully covered outfit, lots of fabric, jacket, dress, layered clothing

pair_reranker.query: Choose the best before/after outfit pair. IMAGE 1 must be full-body, standing upright, fully covered, and match the reference pose/camera/room. IMAGE 2 must also be full-body and standing upright, match the same reference pose/camera/room, be more revealing, and keep a similar dark outfit color/style. Reject headshots, close-ups, cropped/partial-body images, lying down, or sitting poses.
